bssdm 0.2.2
  • Reference

S4 class to represent a climatch SDM.

Source: R/Climatch-class.R
Climatch-class.Rd

The model object (S4) class component for an implementation of the ABARES Climatch species distribution modelling (SDM) method (ABARES, 2020).

Slots

method

SDM method: "climatch".

algorithm

Algorithm: "euclidean" or "closest_standard_score".

variables

List of climate (or environmental) variable names.

sd

The standard deviation of each variable calculated via the climate data (x) or the sd_data when provided.

presence

The selected (nearest within range) climate data for each occurrence point.

coordinates

The coordinates for the selected climate data.

as_score

Indication of whether to generate a score 0-10 or values 0-1.

References

ABARES (2020). Climatch v2.0 User Manual. Canberra. https://climatch.cp1.agriculture.gov.au/ Accessed: November 2021.
